name: Mohammed Ayad
notes: Founder of Dofied (2021), B2B payment platform for pharma & FMCG. Spoke at Baghdad Business School. Expanding to UAE. Abbott as client.

name: Taha Ayad
notes: Dr. Taha Ayad, founder of Saleem healthtech. Spoke at Baghdad Business School. Likely related to Mohammed Ayad (brothers?).
